introduction: SYNOPSISDal-ho is a good-for-nothing bum whose father is an upstart who accumulated his wealth through real estate speculation. Dal-ho has no clear goals and spends his time chasing women and throwing away his father's money. But things turn bad when his father goes bankrupt. Dal-ho and his family find themselves on the run from debt collectors. Dal-ho begins to realize the harsh facts of life and begins to doubt the meaning of life. Caught in a web of inferiority and defeat, Dal-ho is given a proposition he cannot refuse from his ex-girlfriend Mi-ran. As his father's biggest creditor, Mi-ran offers to write off the 350 million won debt in exchange for sole ownership of Dal-ho's body. Dal-ho who had always bought his way into everything has now become a slave to money.故事事 - 基于土地投机jolbu的父亲，谁跟踪妇女才刚刚kkongmuni没有人生目标，并花了独特的湿和扭曲的生活购买和钱卖的乐趣。与此同时，大荷的父亲没有做生意，他破产了。最后，大海的家人正在远离债务人的追求。在他的逃生生活中，他开始意识到寒冷世界的本质，不像以前的经历，有自己的意义研讨会。当他意识到自己的生活毫无意义时，他就沉迷于自卑和失败意识，他的前女友米兰出现，并提出了一个令人难以置信的提议。他父亲最大的债权人米兰将获得与自己身体相关的所有权利，而不是原谅3.5亿韩元。用金钱买走了快乐的达尔霍却反而变成了奴隶制。
